articles.author: Sean O'Kane
articles.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn put a customer satellite in the wrong orbit during its third launch - TechCrunch
articles.description: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the Moon.
articles.content: Jeff Bezos’ space company Blue Origin successfully re-used one of its New Glenn rockets for the first time ever on Sunday, but the company failed at its primary mission: delivering a communications s… [+3678 chars]

articles.title: Trump wants to stop states from regulating AI. This Utah Republican isn’t listening - AP News
